tagline: Intakes assets, assesses the plan and screens execution — a licensed estate-planning attorney signs the instrument.
problem: Drafting wills and trusts is the practice of law under a reasonable-care standard, where a defective execution voids the will and a missed tax election (706 / portability) is irreversible at death.
outcome: Assets and family screened, the plan assessed for capacity / execution formalities / estate-gift-tax exposure straight-through; the licensed attorney signs the instrument before it is executed or filed with the probate court.

steps.does: Intake the assets, beneficiary and family documents
Assess the plan — testamentary capacity, execution formalities by state, and estate/gift/GST tax exposure (706/709)
Screen for undue influence, conflicts of interest and execution-formality gaps
A licensed estate-planning attorney signs the instrument
Execute / file the instrument or probate petition with the court
Monitor and administer the estate — petition status, deadlines, fiduciary administration
